channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: RedotPay executive turnover clouds crypto payments firm's $4 billion U.S. IPO ambition
item.description: The company's internal strain, including reports of required long working hours, is overshadowing its push for a U.S. listing.

item.title: Bitcoin quickly pulls back to $72,300 as Iran fears team up with poor U.S. inflation data
item.description: The price of oil moved higher after reported attacks against Iran's South Pars gas field.

item.title: Bitcoin ETFs' $1.2B Streak Hangs in Balance as FOMC Takes Center Stage
item.description: Experts warn that Bitcoin ETF inflows remain "episodic" without policy shifts, ahead of today's FOMC meeting.

item.title: Crypto cards aren't the future, but onchain credit is
item.description: Crypto cards force asset sales and tax hits. Onchain credit enables yield-bearing collateral power spending without liquidation, making cards obsolete interfaces.

item.title: Morning Minute: The SEC & CFTC Declare 'Most Crypto Assets' Are Not Securities
item.description: After a decade of lawsuits, the SEC and CFTC finally wrote the rules for digital assets.

item.title: Forget AGI—Top AI Models Still Struggle With Math
item.description: New benchmark study results show leading AI models still lag humans in visual math reasoning.

item.title: UK lawmakers urge ‘immediate moratorium’ on crypto political donations
item.description: The committee highlighted that the fast payment traits of crypto, along with tools like mixers, tumblers, and AI-assisted splitting of payments below the £500 reporting threshold.

item.title: RedotPay defends team reshuffle amid funding talks and IPO plans
item.description: RedotPay says it restructured teams for efficiency after a Bloomberg report flagged executive turnover, China sensitivities and new funding talks.

item.title: Connecticut suspends Bitcoin Depot as 2026 revenue outlook worsens
item.description: Connecticut halts Bitcoin Depot’s operations, with the company expecting lower revenue in 2026 amid mounting regulatory pressure and a steep decline in its stock price.

item.title: Powell's comments on oil, inflation are likely to guide bitcoin traders
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 18, 2026

item.title: UK lawmakers seek moratorium on crypto donations to political parties
item.description: A UK parliamentary committee urged an immediate moratorium on crypto political donations until stronger safeguards are in place.

item.title: Bitcoin’s rally runs into 'sell the news' risk ahead of Fed decision
item.description: Two Prime data shows post-meeting weakness dominates, even as markets price a Fed hold and limited rate cuts ahead.

item.title: Bitcoin holds steady at $74,000 as traders turn cautious before Fed meeting
item.description: BTC consolidated with subdued volatility, while derivatives positioning and macro uncertainty signaled cautious market sentiment.

item.title: Tally winds down, citing lack of viable market for DAO tooling
item.description: Tally said its platform served more than one million users, supporting governance across hundreds of organizations and processing over $1 billion in payments.

item.title: Bitcoin stalls at $76K: Key BTC price levels to watch ahead of FOMC
item.description: Bitcoin price traded at $74,000 as investors braced for Jerome Powell’s post-FOMC speech that could see volatile swings toward key BTC price levels.

item.title: Ethereum aims to cut bridge times by 98% to 13 seconds with new rule
item.description: Ethereum’s FCR aims to reduce bridge times by up to 98%, bringing L1-to-L2 and exchange deposits down to 13 seconds without a hard fork.

item.title: Bitcoin is stuck below $75,000 even after landmark SEC, CFTC crypto rules
item.description: Bitcoin remains stuck near key resistance around $75,000, leaving the broader market in limbo.

item.title: Bitcoin ETF inflow streak nears October run, but totals still lag
item.description: US spot Bitcoin ETFs draw $1.2 billion over seven days, far short of October 2025’s nine-day $6 billion streak, as XRP ETFs turn green.

item.title: Bitrefill accuses North Korea-linked Lazarus hacker group for compromising 18,500 purchase records
item.description: Bitrefill will cover the losses from operational capital.

item.title: Australian crypto shopping surges, but so do banking blocks: Survey
item.description: Online shopping was the leading real-world use case for crypto among Australians, followed by paying for services such as freelancing and video game purchases.

item.title: UK Panel Calls Crypto Donations 'High Risk,' Seeks Immediate Ban
item.description: A cross-party committee has warned that cryptocurrency donations leave UK politics open to foreign interference.

item.title: Key US senator eyes breakthrough for stalled crypto bill this week
item.description: The Senate Banking Committee has been looking to advance its crypto market structure bill since postponing a markup in January.

item.title: Bitcoin Depot Flags Control 'Weaknesses' as Connecticut Halts Its Operations
item.description: Its license was suspended after regulators accused the Bitcoin ATM operator of overcharging kiosk users and failing to provide some refunds.

item.title: XRP hovers near $14 million options battleground that could sway trading
item.description: XRP is trading around $1.50, just above a key options cluster at $1.40 on Deribit.

item.title: Bitcoin inflows to exchanges spike as BTC hits resistance at $75K
item.description: Spikes in large deposits to exchanges have been associated with increased selling pressure, according to analysts at CryptoQuant.

item.title: Trump memecoin whales pile in ahead of Mar-a-Lago gala
item.description: CoinCarp data shows over 91% of TRUMP supply is concentrated in the top 10 wallets, and 97% is held by the top 100 wallets.

item.title: Meta to shutter Horizon Worlds metaverse on VR in favor of mobile
item.description: Mark Zuckerberg's Meta is dropping VR support for its flagship metaverse world, which it launched in 2021 as part of the company's big gamble on virtual worlds.

item.title: Coin Center urges SEC to prioritize rulemaking over no-action letters
item.description: The Washington, D.C.-based nonprofit cryptocurrency policy think tank argued that no-action letters within the crypto industry lead to fragmentation and uneven treatment.

item.title: Democrats Press Meta Over Facial Recognition Plans for Smart Glasses
item.description: Lawmakers are citing privacy risks tied to wearable AI and are asking how Meta intends to secure consent from both users and bystanders.

item.title: SEC chair Paul Atkins floats ‘safe harbor’ exemptions for crypto
item.description: SEC chair Paul Atkins says the regulator should review giving a range of exemptions to crypto companies to allow “bespoke pathways” to raise money.

item.title: Stratton wins Illinois Senate primary, defeating crypto-backed Krishnamoorthi
item.description: Lieutenant Governor Juliana Stratton is now likely to be the next Senator from Illinois, after defeating Rep. Raja Krishnamoorthi, who enjoyed major backing from crypto PAC Fairshake.

item.title: Bitrefill links Lazarus Group to employee laptop hack, stolen funds
item.description: Bitrefill didn’t reveal how much money was drained in the March 1 incident but said it will absorb the losses using its operational capital.

item.title: An excellent post explaining the importance of Ethereum having a dynamically available consensus, that both provides economic finality and ensures chain progress even under conditions where economic finality is impossible. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFBmdGl2NGFIem1IZzYtZTREUGw4eFhtSzV5ZjJ2VWp0cFVUWjZYUGFzaEFjdmg1Ui1LR05EOUItZVZDLUFPWDZKN3c3RVNjMWFBY3FQVWFrcTJaZngxUEpOM1BZNVJldw?oc=5" target="_blank">An excellent post explaining…

item.title: 🇺🇸 BIG: SEC Chair Paul Atkins unveils Regulation Crypto Assets, a token safe harbor proposal with three paths for crypto builders. A startup exemption, a fundraising exemption, and an investment contract safe harbor. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFB0WTdtOGpCdEk0QllvaGhad0JyNmlQcncxWWdzX29KNHQ5c1dJYkZqRkVKaU9mQUpKbHFJNjlJeU9tZS1LREpmUlA4RlRiUEdlNTRmc01nWHBOV3M0bFZsMGt5dHE?oc=5" target="_blank">🇺🇸 BIG: SEC Chair Paul Atkins…

item.title: We always knew XRP wasn't a security - and now the @SECGov has made clear what it is: a digital commodity. Grateful to the Crypto Task Force for working to deliver the clarity that markets, investors, and innovators have long deserved. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTE14LWdKb05XZExENWdIX0Z2WjFZYXJIOGIweVFUUnJ1b2VYaXhXNW1lOVZrZFFTeEVNVlFMeGJ3UGtSQ3pKNFktZmpudWVIRmh5b243dDZjOG1EMGd1TWhhdA?oc=5" target="_blank">We always knew XRP wasn't a security…

item.title: Nvidia’s DLSS 5 Launch Sparks Meme Frenzy as Gamers Balk at AI ‘Neural Rendering’
item.description: NVIDIA pitched DLSS 5 as a breakthrough in real-time rendering. Players saw something closer to AI overreach.

item.title: SEC says most crypto assets may not be securities under federal law
item.description: The interpretative notice included information on token taxonomy and what digital assets the regulator would consider a security under federal law.

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Crypto Gift Card Platform Bitrefill Discloses Hack, Points Finger at North Korean Groups
item.description: Bitrefill, which lets users swap Bitcoin, Dogecoin and other crypto assets for gift cards, disclosed a breach that took place on March 1.

item.title: THEY DID IT. The SEC and CFTC just dropped a landmark document that officially classifies crypto assets. They're actually telling us which crypto assets are securities and which ones aren't - by name! THIS IS SOMETHING GENSLER REFUSED TO DO (he fo - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYEFVX3lxTFBZbHJ2NFJ1SVRiVHJ2dUV3MTdTbHBPcWtEMU5famZhRWhVT2dvcU9leklZcFdDRTVucGVPSnJXNkd1eEg3RWhVdzB6N0lpNkx5dzRsdWFDbkxUdWdBcHZVNw?oc=5" target="_blank">THEY DID IT. The SEC and CFTC just d…

item.title: Senator Tim Scott says market structure negotiations are advancing
item.description: The South Carolina Republican said he might see a draft of stablecoin yield language as soon as this week, and other issues continue to be negotiated.

item.title: Crypto Bill Stablecoin Yield Compromise Could Come This Week: Tim Scott
item.description: The White House is prepared to announce progress as soon as tomorrow on the issue plaguing crypto's market structure bill.

item.title: I was a fashion photographer for over a decade before crypto. I worked for magazines like @ELLEmagazine @marieclaire @Cosmopolitan and brands like @LouisVuitton @gucci and more. The Vanity Fair article was a setup to mock crypto and those it depict - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFBTVEhtYWM2VGNmUUhiLW9rZGZLM2owMTU4R0dPM2YwTTRPZGU3cklRd0FjR1IzRVJoMV96TV9jdFdLYzBzSWpScEhJemhkc2l3c3AzNEQ2V3RsekVta0hJSjVReUx2UW8?oc=5" target="_blank">I was a fashion photographe…

item.title: US lawmakers introduce bill to crack down on prediction markets war bets
item.description: The BETS OFF Act from two Democratic lawmakers came in response to several “highly unusual bets” on the US-Israel conflict with Iran, suggesting insider information.

item.title: Arizona Files Charges Against Kalshi, Calling Prediction Market an 'Illegal Gambling Operation'
item.description: Prediction market platform Kalshi was hit with 20 criminal charges in Arizona, which alleged that it's an "illegal gambling operation."

item.title: Moody’s brings credit ratings onchain with Canton Network integration
item.description: The move marks an early step toward embedding traditional risk assessment into blockchain-based financial infrastructure.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇺🇸 CFTC and SEC issues statement clarifying that Bitcoin mining rewards are labeled under "protocol mining" as not securities. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTFA1NlcyWGxEZUJkbndUbzN5N29xaVBxc2ZPT042cTN3S1lGNjV6VDVYYmVGSXg3c3dFUzdRNHNOTjJ5TDhvRl9xZzdxTWZpQjBtd3Jod1lLMldGckE5ci1zMlQxVXk4UEk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇺🇸 CFTC and SEC …

item.title: CFTC Clears Phantom to Connect Users to Regulated Derivatives Markets
item.description: Under the ruling, the developer of the Phantom self-custody crypto wallet avoids having to register as a broker.

item.title: Bitcoin's rally faces key hurdle with Wednesday's Fed meeting
item.description: Hot PPI inflation data in the morning and hawkish remarks by Powell in the afternoon would be the most damaging combination for risk assets, including crypto, Bitfinex analysts said.

item.title: U.S. SEC issues first-ever definitions for what crypto assets are securities
item.description: The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission shared the informal guidance it'll use to classify crypto securities alongside its sister agency overseeing commodities.

item.title: 🚨 BIG: The SEC says most crypto assets are not securities, including staking, airdrops, and Bitcoin mining, providing new regulatory clarity. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBtZXhoN2hXNmsyanpEMlRZb3dQYm5POTg0T2pBRVlEdTdMdzh4TkJaZ2psNFdlZVU3Y29UZjFDTFd6NHpPWm8xR2JhZkFISjU0S2hHSkdWZzVXOGstaWN1Zl9lS0s?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 BIG: The SEC says most crypt…

item.title: SEC Declares 'Most Crypto Assets' Not Securities, Including Staking, Airdrops and Bitcoin Mining
item.description: SEC Chair Paul Atkins said the new securities guidance, which impacts "most crypto assets," provides "clear lines in clear terms."

item.title: TODAY 🚨: The Commission issued an interpretation that clarifies the application of federal securities laws to crypto assets. This is a major step to provide greater clarity regarding the Commission’s treatment of crypto assets. Read the release here: ow.ly/XhhV - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiW0FVX3lxTE5QLURWUU0xLWxpOEhNUTY4N2Y1VTZidlAyMHB3UURBWHhEcnVOTG5TWkR4eEJlTWR5ZzY2SmNrYzN5dzgtVzBMeFBFdHAxbU5CZXpBZW5XYXpjb2c?oc=5" target="_blank">TODAY 🚨: The Commission issued an interpre…

item.title: 🚨JUST IN: The @SECGov and @CFTC have issued joint, Commission-level interpretive guidance outlining how federal securities laws apply to certain crypto assets and transactions. This follows a submission to OIRA earlier this month signaling the agencies’ - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE1hcUptSkhHU3lBTlBXQUUtTk9rc00zMS1mUWlyVy13bHo4WUdVOERVTFJfYkdCLUxFN1FmZWRaSTczUTd4bjgtclV6UnIzV2l2RWRjWlRqTXlpSnR6UWg4bUhvVkVKUQ?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨JUST IN: The @SECGov and @…

item.title: JUST IN: There's now an 83% chance Bitcoin hits $80,000 this year, according to Polymarket 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1wQzZlMDFlRFRNMEpsSnk3dVJMZ2RzWDB5b0wtWDZ6MTdVang0WUY0R0tqTVlEYkhuMFBQbjhTQXNxRF9mbV9IdzRlOHlkMTR4V2g2NGtKVkNIaEw4X0I1bjA0bEM0SEE?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: There's now an 83%…

item.title: What If Elon Musk's Grok Leaks Classified Info? Elizabeth Warren Is Worried—The Pentagon Isn't
item.description: Sen. Warren is demanding answers after the Pentagon handed Elon Musk's xAI classified network access—despite NSA warnings and a trail of harmful AI outputs.

item.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-5.4 Mini and Nano, Which Could Be More Useful Than the Big Model
item.description: OpenAI's new small models are faster and cheaper than GPT-5.4, and for most everyday use cases, that's exactly what developers and businesses actually need.

item.title: Mastercard's $1.8 billion deal 'a clear answer' to a massive shift in the global payment war
item.description: Analysts say the $1.8 billion acquisition shows stablecoins are moving from niche use to global settlement rails.

item.title: Urea Surges 34% as Iran Conflict Ripples Through Commodities, Bitcoin
item.description: The Iran conflict is impacting on commodities beyond oil, as the closure of the Strait of Hormuz chokes off shipping.

item.title: BREAKING: SQUARE TO AUTO-ENABLE BITCOIN PAYMENTS FOR MILLIONS OF SELLERS Square will auto-enable Bitcoin payments for all eligible sellers starting March 30, 2026, according to an updated Terms of Service notice sent to users. The change - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTE4yVE9BS0R1UjlfaDllMnpWMlQ0RDQzb3lfa1ZkcUxKRk9yU1BpaHo1WDlkdEhQNERVWUVselF5dGpNNkF3eVBKcUstdHVydEpleHdnNjlBclJxZjJuWlE5LVl3a0cxQQ?oc=5" target="_blank">BREAKING: SQUARE TO AUTO-ENA…
